title: Move Go HTTP telemetry to the stable semantic-convention API
prompt: Update telemetry/middleware.go from the legacy OpenTelemetry v1.17.0 HTTP semantic-convention helpers to the generated stable attribute keys in semconv/v1.26.0. The v1.26.0 package has no tracing httpconv helpers, so construct the equivalent request and response attributes with its generated keys and add local protocolVersion, requestScheme, and serverStatus helpers for the behavior formerly supplied by httpconv. Server spans must emit http.request.method, http.route, network.protocol.version, url.scheme, server.address, and http.response.status_code without deprecated HTTP or network keys. Preserve the existing low-cardinality span name, parent/child context relationship, server status mapping (5xx responses are errors; 2xx and 4xx responses remain unset), handler-error status override, handler result propagation, span completion, and transparent behavior with a no-op tracer. Only telemetry/middleware.go may be changed; do not modify the tests, module metadata, or local OpenTelemetry fixture.
